title: You Deleted Everything and AWS Is Still Charging You
summary: AWS Developers shares a cleanup checklist for identifying and eliminating hidden charges that persist after deleting AWS resources. The video covers common sources of surprise charges including RDS snapshots, EBS volumes, elastic IPs, and NAT gateways, plus how to set up billing alarms for cost monitoring.
